# Golden Layout (Vendored)

This directory contains vendored Golden Layout browser assets for Apmatia desktop shell use.

Source:
- https://cdnjs.com/libraries/golden-layout (version 2.6.0)

Files:
- `golden-layout.min.js` (from `cjs/ts/golden-layout.min.js`)
- `goldenlayout-base.min.css`
- `goldenlayout-dark-theme.min.css`
- `goldenlayout-light-theme.min.css`
- `LICENSE` (MIT)

Note:
- The `golden-layout.min.js` file is the latest minified library file published on cdnjs.
